steps.label: cause
steps.text: Bentonite clay is mixed into a wine containing unstable proteins.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: The charged clay adsorbs proteins and settles with them so they can be removed.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The wine is less likely to develop a protein haze after bottling.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The wine is less likely to develop a protein haze after bottling.
